evals.prompt: Lower an eligible UIR module containing pure methods, a recursive pair, and one opaque permission method into an existing C# skeleton without touching manual regions.
evals.expected_output: Deterministic callable/SCC plans, verified faithful patches for safe methods, and a constrained escalation packet for the opaque method.

evals.prompt: Regenerate a Java target after one lowering rule version changed; an engineer also edited a generated method and a manual helper.
evals.expected_output: Affected-callable regeneration only, hash-aware merge/conflict handling, no manual overwrite, and stable declaration provenance.

evals.prompt: Produce idiomatic TypeScript from faithful output when the compiler backend is unavailable.
evals.expected_output: Fail-closed status with no idiomatic patch because faithful static validation cannot run.
